goal: Investigate: Does model size affect the benefit of learning rate warmup? Compare DistilBERT (66M) with a smaller model (TinyBERT or albert-base) on SST-2. Hypothesis: smaller models benefit MORE from warmup because their parameter space is more sensitive to initial optimization. 3 seeds (42, 123, 456), 3 epochs, 2000 samples, paired t-test.
